Lore Item No Trade
Slot: BACK
AC: 24
STR: +15 DEX: +15 STA: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +100
SV FIRE: +35
Haste: +40%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: BACK
AC: 24
STR: +15 DEX: +15 STA: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +100
SV FIRE: +35
Haste: +40%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No

Lucy Entry By:keltana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 10:03:52
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Test of the Fire Storm

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name

Please can we have more ideas on how loot should be handled and whether a Necro should get this over a beaslord? i REALLY LOVE reading all of the b1tch1ng about it. /sarcasm off

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 16 2003 at 1:25 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ;tell prexus.ronzer Your a newb for saying this drops in crushbone!
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 03 2002 at 5:18 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Who and what races? I have the champions helm but hate the graffic on my vah shir warrior. All the helms look the same.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 07 2003 at 3:28 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what the hell does that have to do with this item or quest? LOL
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 04 2003 at 10:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) no offense but by level 56 you should have figured out that the black people are erudites
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 14 2002 at 7:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) who's the lame *** with the stupid looking helm???
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 29 2002 at 2:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Someone who is obviously much stronger and better equiped than you will ever be.
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 20 2002 at 10:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) That's it? That's your uber gear? That's level 30 stuff. I thought my gear sucked.
RE: LOL

# Jun 27 2002 at 11:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754842910
104 posts
If you actually had bothered to read the post before opening your mouth and inserting your foot you would notice that he at no point said he had uber gear. He just said that the "stupid looking helm" was probably very nice considering its owner also owned this cloak. Always helps to read before you make an *** of your self eh?

Haste
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2001 at 5:16 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592756618184
View User Forum
8 posts
Haste percentage was finally fixed on this last week, upping it to 40% where it was supposed to be all along.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 26 2001 at 1:24 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) heh this has nuttin to do with this cloak but which helm is that the dude in the picture is wearing... it looks pretty kewl :)
RE: kewl helm
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 2:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247994243
Scholar
78 posts
He's wearing a custom velious helm. When you get your velious quest helm, it has no graphic, however, every city, Skyshrine, Kael, and the Thurgadin one is in Icewell, has an armorer type who you can go trade in your helm to and receive back the same helm, but with a unique graphic. Only about half the classes can turn in their helm.

Some are godawfully ugly (See the high elf tiger head...) Some are insanely cool, like the dark elf male helm.
▲ Page top
RE: kewl helm
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2003 at 7:58 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252328795
149 posts
Not really custom anymore. I have a level 63 erudite SK and can tell you that Velious Helms, cultural helms, tae ew war helm, and helm of the raldukan all give that graphic with new models. I would assume that SoE simply decided to use that as the erudite plate helm graphic. chain/leather helms have a different graphic.
▲ Page top
RE: kewl helm
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 8:26 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361576738
24 posts

Zanidar D'elothe
49th season Shadow Knight

Xev

RE: kewl helm
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 7:19 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591761991555
Scholar
300 posts

# Jul 13 2001 at 12:12 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Get yourself ally faction with CoV, then go to Halls of Testing and kill the named mobs for the symbols, and then kill Dozekar the Cursed for the Tears.

This cloak isn't a monk item... its an item for any class that can use it! OMFG!
▲ Page top
RE: Great!
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 12:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758247306
7 posts
Um, if you lok a bit more closely you will see that it says "Best cloak in the game for a monk". Nothing about being a monk-only loot item.
Most guilds doing ToV are on some kind of point system.
Typically as a monk I tend to save my dkp for multiple resist items with good ac, as haste for a monk is always maxed even with a fbss at this level (66% SoS, 21% fbss is greater than the 86% max haste). Though that is my personal preference and could very well change.
▲ Page top
RE: Great!
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2002 at 12:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248597282
1 post
Max Haste for a lvl 60 monk is 112%
▲ Page top
RE: Great!
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2003 at 9:23 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783198011
45 posts
There are bard songs that can increase the haste cap, buy upto 25% increase if i remember rightly.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 10 2001 at 2:24 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) how does a level 46 guy know this has 40% haste does he have i doubt it i bet he dont even know someone with it so why did he post 40% with no proof i bet he wants to feel special but that my opiinion aand if he does have proof of how to find this out please tell
RE: how
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2002 at 3:14 PM Rating: Default
EnvyEyes
133 posts
Hi! Just thought you should know, there's this wonderful typographical invention called PUNCTUATION!!!! Learn to use it, or repeat the 3rd grade!

/flame off

Sorry, I hate reading posts and having to decipher the person's thoughts, just to figure out WTF they are saying... it's amazing how a simple thing like a period (.), when placed correctly, can totally modify a string of words.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 10 2001 at 1:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I bet you think I am going to declare that this is a great monk item, don't you? Well, it is!!! Hehe. It is also a great item for any of the other classes listed that can use it. With those stats, I'd find a way to use it even if it weighed 10 pounds.
One bad thing...
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 10:10 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591757464810
156 posts
The one bad thing about all these NoDrop haste items is that when you're in a Guild that gets them and puts priority on certain members, it gets kinda discouraging when the one person who has priority already has a 30% NoDrop Haste item and gets the 40% NoDrop Haste item and basically destroys the first one because its no good to him anymore and you get shafted again.

Yes, I know its a Quest item, but they still have to loot the Quest items and yes, for the most part, they already know what items are for what quests.
▲ Page top
RE: One bad thing...
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2001 at 6:57 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757735289
13 posts
A smart guild would not award a 40% no drop item to somone who ha a 30% no drop haste item if your in a guild that focuses on one person being upgraded and never tosses stuff to the rest of the guild i recomend you foot it on out.
▲ Page top
RE: One bad thing...
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2001 at 9:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592790120983
Scholar
65 posts
Most guilds capable of ToV use a point system.
